full_quote:
I had the pleasure of working with Kyle for a year on various projects ranging from concepting to detail wireframing. I was impressed by his ability to quickly adapt to new subjects and move swiftly from chaos to design solutions.

And one of the things that’s so remarkable about Kyle, he is such a good mentor. I was so lucky to have him as my mentor when I first joined frog. He is not only willing to share his skills and knowledges, but also offering guidance and constructive feedback to me. His enthusiasm and standard of work have set a great role model for my career.

Oh, and Kyle is also an active reader. He shares inspiring book notes and insights with his friends all the time.

As a team member or a leader, Kyle earns my highest recommendation. I truly enjoyed working with him. Beyond his professionalism, he is someone who is easy to work with and fit in very well with the rest of the creative community.
